claim: For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then 2^n - 2 is divisible by n.
predicate: (n <= 1) or (not is_prime(n)) or ((pow(2, n, n) - 2) % n == 0)

predicate: (n <= 1) or (not is_prime(n)) or ((pow(3, n, n) - 3) % n == 0)

claim: For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then n^2 divides (2^n - 2).
predicate: (n <= 1) or (not is_prime(n)) or ((pow(2, n, n * n) - 2) % (n * n) == 0)

claim: For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then 6 divides (2^n - 2) and (3^n - 3).
For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then 2^(n-1) ≡ 1 mod n.

claim: For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then n divides (n choose k) for 0 < k < n.
predicate: (n <= 1) or (not is_prime(n)) or all((math.comb(n, k) % n == 0) for k in range(1, n))

claim: For all integers n > 1, if n is prime then n divides (sum_{k=1}^{n-1} k^{n-1}).
predicate: (n <= 1) or (not is_prime(n)) or ((sum(pow(k, n - 1, n) for k in range(1, n)) % n) == 0)
